title: Krash's Axolotls
description:
Axolotl variants! 
Requested by a community member of V.O.I.D's Abyss Server
body:
### What is this?
This is a resourcepack that adds variants of variants for the axolotl textures! 

### Does this work with Optifine?
**No.** To get the highest level of functionality with this mod, Please use [Traben's ETF [Entity Texture Features]](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

I have no intention of making this resourcepack optifine compatible.
